action.reasoning: Observation: Balanced accuracy 0.6806 with ResNet-50 (CE+balanced sampler+mixup, 20 epochs) is below best 0.7137. Few-shot accuracy still low at 0.497. Analysis: ResNet-50 may be limited; convnext_tiny could provide better features. Also classifier retraining (cRT) after representation learning can boost tail classes without harming head. CutMix added to augmentation mix can further improve generalization. Decision: Implement convnext_tiny backbone option, CutMix, and two-phase training: 50 epochs representation learning with mixup/cutmix + balanced sampler, then 20 epochs classifier retraining with frozen backbone and re-balanced sampling. Run full training immediately to save iterations and time; submit eval.
